Synthesis_Claim: LCNC platforms can accelerate bounded prototyping and workflow creation.
Evidence_Status: Supported by multiple prototype, review, and domain studies; external validity remains task-dependent.

Synthesis_Claim: Citizen development broadens participation but does not remove professional software engineering responsibilities.
Evidence_Status: Supported by enterprise, adoption, role, and discussion studies.

Synthesis_Claim: Security and privacy are high-impact but under-represented in the final coded evidence.
Evidence_Status: Evidence gap: only two papers were primarily coded SECURITY_PRIVACY, so claims are framed as risk/gap rather than prevalence.

Synthesis_Claim: AI-assisted LCNC shifts development from visual composition toward prompt, agent, and workflow-mediated specification.
Evidence_Status: Supported by recent prototype, benchmark, agent, workflow, and user-study papers; rapidly evolving evidence.

Synthesis_Claim: Long-term maintainability, scalability, portability, and lifecycle governance remain weaker evidence areas.
Evidence_Status: Supported as recurring limitations/gaps rather than settled empirical conclusions.
